item.title: 线性代数
item.description: [1.1 矩阵概念与运算（1）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975210/1.1.1.pdf) [1.1 矩阵概念与运算（２）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975211/1.1.pdf) [1.2向量与分块矩阵.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975213/1.2.pdf) [1.3 初等变换与初等阵.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975214/1.3.pdf) [2.1 n阶行列式定义.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975215/2.1.n.pdf) [2.2 行列式的性质.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975216/2.2.pdf) [2.3 行列式的计算.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975217/2.3.pdf) [2.4 分块三角阵与矩阵乘积的行列式.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975218/2.4.pdf) [3.1 可逆阵 （1）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975220/3.1.1.pdf) [3.1-3.2部分练习和答案.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975221/3.1-3.2.pdf) [3.1可逆阵（2）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975222/3.1.2.pdf) [3.2 n乘n线性方程组.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975223/3.2.n.n.pdf) [4.1 向量与空间直角坐标系.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975225/4.1.pdf) [4.2 数量积、向量积和混合积.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975227/4.2.pdf) [4.3 空间平面及其方程.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975228/4.3.pdf) [4.4 空间直线及其方程.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975230/4.4.pdf) [4.5 位置关系、夹角与距离.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975231/4.5.pdf) [5.1 习题讲解-向量组的线性相关性和秩.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975233/5.1.-.pdf) [5.1 向量组的线性相关性和秩 - 线代解析几何.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975234/5.1.-.pdf) [5.2 矩阵的秩-总结与习题.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975235/5.2.-.pdf) [5.2线性方程组解的性质、结构与解法.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975236/5.2.pdf) [5.2小节部分习题.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975238/5.2.pdf) [5.3 等价向量组 矩阵秩应用（2）pptx.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975239/5.3.2.pptx.pdf) [6.1线性方程组解的存在性-（1）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975240/6.1.-.1.pdf) [6.2线性方程组解的性质、结构与解法.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975242/6.2.pdf) [6.2小节部分习题.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975243/6.2.pdf) [7.1-7.2部分习题解答.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975244/7.1-7.2.pdf) [7.1向量空间.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975245/7.1.pdf) [7.2向量的正交性.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975247/7.2.pdf) [8.1 特征值与特征向量.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975249/8.1.pdf) [8.1小节部分习题答案.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975250/8.1.pdf) [8.2 相似矩阵.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975251/8.2.pdf) [8.3 实对称阵的相似对角化.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975252/8.3.pdf) [8.3-9.2部分习题.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975253/8.3-9.2.pdf) [9.1二次型概念及标准形.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975254/9.1.pdf) [9.2 正定阵.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975256/9.2.pdf) [9.3空间曲面、曲线方程9.4二次曲面.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975260/9.3.9.4.pdf) [慕课第二章作业答案(1)-修改.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975261/1.-.pdf) [慕课第三章作业答案.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975262/default.pdf) [慕课第一章作业答案.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975263/default.pdf) 。
